name: BLADDER DIVERTICULUM
definition: cavity formed by herniation of bladder mucosa through muscular wall, joined to bladder CONGENITAL / IDIOPATHIC DIVERTICULUM
dominant_finding: may appear complex ← thickened wall / debris / soft-tissue component
discriminating_features: hypoechoic fluid-filled structure continuous with bladder wall
may appear complex ← thickened wall / debris / soft-tissue component

general: hypoechoic fluid-filled structure continuous with bladder wall
may appear complex ← thickened wall / debris / soft-tissue component
